subject: Billing Core

evidence_summary.detail: Unit tests exist but release gates and shared dashboard are absent.

assumptions: Repository inspection was not available for this fixture.

maturity_assessment.evidence: Basic strategy exists for unit and integration tests.
Some tests run in CI but automation is partial.
Commit checks exist but PR and release gates are incomplete.
Test data reset is manual and snapshots are not versioned.
Coverage is tracked but leading and lagging metrics are not combined.
Developers write some tests but quality ownership is uneven.

test_strategy.rationale: A monolith benefits from fast unit feedback with limited E2E surface.

test_data_strategy.synthetic_data: Use deterministic factories for critical billing cases.
test_data_strategy.masking_policy: Mask customer identifiers in lower environments.
test_data_strategy.reset_policy: Reset database snapshots before PR and nightly gates.

quality_gates.on_failure: Tech lead reviews failed quality evidence.
QA lead investigates before next release window.
Release manager blocks release until remediation is complete.
On-call engineer rolls back or pauses rollout.

roadmap.focus: Baseline gates, strategy, and dashboard ownership.
roadmap.success_criteria: Commit gate and metrics baseline are approved.

roadmap.focus: PR gate, integration tests, and deterministic test data.
roadmap.success_criteria: PR gate pass rate exceeds 90 percent.

roadmap.focus: Nightly regression, performance baseline, and release gate.
roadmap.success_criteria: Release gate blocks unmet load and security criteria.

roadmap.focus: Flaky reduction and quarterly metric review.

priority_actions.action: Version deterministic test data snapshots and automate reset.
Add blocking PR and release gates with explicit criteria.
Make developers owners of unit quality and PR gate evidence.

guardian.reason: Plan is valid but current maturity is below target level 4.
